summary: ARENAKORE structural reorganization tested. ARENA = Community Hub (no radar), KORE = Passport + City Dropdown + ArenaGO Radar + KORE CARD. All 7 feature checks passed. Login: admin@arenadare.com / Admin2026! → lands on /kore. ARENA tab shows COMMUNITY HUB hero, KORE OF THE DAY (THUNDER_MAN, MMA, +340 XP), ELITE DIVISION UPDATES (6 athletes). KORE tab: Passport (ARENABOSS, FOUNDER, LVL 24, PRO, #1 CITY RANK, MILANO), ArenaGO Radar SVG (21 circles, 4 lines, sweep line animated), KORE CARD (DNA bars, QR, APPLE/GOOGLE WALLET). City dropdown: MILANO opens modal with SELEZIONA CITY and city list. Zero emojis confirmed on all screens.

issues: Radar SVG occupies full screen height (~315px) making scroll to KORE CARD require significant swipe effort on mobile. The radar rings remain very low opacity (0.12) — same intentional dark aesthetic as before. Confirmed working via DOM (21 circles, 4 lines).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow* style props deprecated', 'onStartShouldSetResponder unknown event handler', 'TouchableMixin deprecated' — React Native Web compatibility warnings. Non-breaking, no UX impact. Pre-existing from prior iterations.

critical_code_review_comments: Arena tab correctly removes radar — ArenaGoRadar component only exists in kore.tsx. ARENA body includes 'ARENAGO RADAR' text only because React Native Router pre-renders all tabs in DOM simultaneously — NOT a bug, visual check confirms no radar on ARENA screen.
KORE tab structure is correct: PassportIdentity → ArenaGoRadar → KoreCard → XpProgress order matches spec.
City dropdown SELEZIONA CITY modal works correctly with 17 cities including international ones (LONDON, PARIS, BARCELONA, BERLIN, NEW YORK, TOKYO, DUBAI).
Admin user ARENABOSS is_admin=true so isFounder=true — FOUNDER badge renders correctly with gold color #D4AF37.
MOCKED: KORE OF THE DAY data (THUNDER_MAN), Division Updates (static list), ArenaGO radar athlete blips (mock positions), city rank via api.getMyRank.

feature_test_results.ARENA_community_hub_hero_banner: PASS - 'COMMUNITY HUB' title visible. ARENAKORE brand, 'DOVE L'ELITE SI CONFRONTA' tagline, stats row: 1,240 ATLETI ATTIVI / 384 SESSIONI OGGI / 23 RECORD BATTUTI
feature_test_results.ARENA_kore_of_the_day: PASS - KORE OF THE DAY section: THUNDER_MAN, MMA, LVL 14, RANK #12, +340 XP, ATLETA DEL GIORNO badge, RECORD PERSONALE 47 REP DEEP SQUAT
feature_test_results.ARENA_elite_division_updates: PASS - All 6 athletes: MAYA_J, TORO_94, SASHA_V, KIRA_M, ALEX_K, MANU_B with XP values and time stamps
feature_test_results.ARENA_no_radar: PASS - No ArenaGO radar component in arena.tsx. ARENA screen visually confirmed showing only Community Hub content
feature_test_results.KORE_passport_identity: PASS - ARENABOSS username, FOUNDER gold badge, TUTTI ATHLETICS sport, LVL 24 badge, PRO badge, CITY RANK #1 gold, TOP 10 badge
feature_test_results.KORE_city_rank_and_dropdown: PASS - ZONA label, MILANO button visible. Tap MILANO opens 'SELEZIONA CITY' bottom sheet modal. Selecting ROMA updates button from MILANO to ROMA. Modal closes after selection.
feature_test_results.KORE_arenago_radar: PASS - ArenaGO Radar section with LIVE pill renders. SVG: 21 circles (3 rings + fill + 5 athlete blips×2 + 5 event circles + center dot+ring), 4 lines (2 cross axes + sweep tail + main sweep). Cyan sweep line animated.
feature_test_results.KORE_kore_card: PASS - KORE CARD section: ATHLETE PASSPORT title, DNA bars (VEL/FOR/RES/AGI/TEC/POT), AVG 99, QR code (react-native-qrcode-svg), XP 11765, RANK #1, KORE #00011, APPLE WALLET + GOOGLE WALLET buttons
feature_test_results.zero_emojis: PASS - Zero Unicode emojis found across ARENA and KORE tabs. All icons are Ionicons vector icons.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 12 structural reorganization fully tested. ARENA tab = Community Hub (hero banner, KORE OF THE DAY THUNDER_MAN, Elite Division Updates 6 athletes). KORE tab = Passport Identity (top) → ArenaGO Radar (middle) → KORE CARD (bottom). 4 bottom tabs: ARENA, KORE, (NEXUS in center gold circle), DNA, RANK. Login: admin@arenadare.com / Admin2026! → lands on /kore. MOCKED: KORE OF THE DAY, Division Updates, radar blips. City dropdown has 17 cities, MILANO default. Radar SVG renders but is visually very dark (low opacity design). Scroll via mouse.wheel works on web preview but requires 2+ wheel events to reach KORE CARD area.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. ARENAGO RADAR appearing in document.body.innerText on ARENA page check is a React Native Router false positive — all tabs are pre-rendered in DOM simultaneously. Visual screenshots confirm ARENA tab shows Community Hub ONLY with no radar UI rendered. This is expected behavior for Expo Router tab navigation.
